response.justification: Candidate is a capable full-stack engineer with strong testing and web/backend craftsmanship, but the role explicitly requires 8 years of C++ and deep large-scale distributed-systems/cloud-compute platform experience. The resume shows only brief C/C++ work at National Instruments (~6 months) and is dominated by Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang. No evidence of formal technical leadership of a cloud compute platform or production cloud architecture at the scale implied.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and DevOps
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops/mentoring
Some low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems exposure at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
concerns: Far short of the 8-year C++ requirement (only one short NI role used C/C++)
No demonstrated technical leadership role over a cloud compute platform or cloud/DevOps team
Limited production cloud architecture footprint (AWS CDK at Optilyz only; no GCP/large-scale compute platform work)

key_factors.factor: Lack of formal tech-lead role on cloud compute platform
Software craftsmanship, testing, and mentoring track record
